title: checkout API 5xx rate above 2%
summary: Elevated 5xx on checkout after deploy; rolled back after DB CPU saturation identified.

title: prod-db-1 cpu > 90%
summary: Long-running analytics query cancelled; index added on orders table.

title: queue lag > 30s on email-worker
summary: Worker scaled from 3 to 6 replicas; lag cleared.

title: auth login failures > 5%
summary: TOKEN_ISSUER typo in deploy; rollback restored logins.

title: disk usage > 85% on logs-volume
summary: Log rotation cron fixed; volume extended.
